chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4853 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.21249/2019 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Fawad Chand advocate holds brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for respondent It is jointly submitted that this petition is squarely covered by Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Yaqoob Ahmed vs. Federation of Pakistan (CP D 3757 of 2013) and other connected mattes, therefore, this petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
